title: Trowers & Hamlins relocates Banking & Finance Partner Debopam Dutta to Dubai
description: Trowers & Hamlins has relocated Partner, Debopam Dutta, to Dubai as part of its strategy to grow its Banking and Finance practice across the UAE and key international corridors.Dutta, who also leads the firm's India Desk, will be based in Dubai alongside Abu Dhabi-based Partner Elias Moubarak, giving the firm an integrated Banking and Finance presence across the UAE. His practice spans the Middle East, South Asia and ASEAN, advising banks, financial institutions, funds, REITs and MNCs on fin
